name: Knight
description: Stout, well-armored frontline tank. BULWARK: a directional shield-wall — allies sheltered behind/beside the Knight take less damage (attack from another side to bypass it). TAUNT: forces nearby minions to target the Knight, pulling them off the squishies.
flavorText: Honour first. Survival second.

abilities.name: Bulwark
abilities.desc: Raises a directional shield-wall; allies sheltered behind or beside him take reduced damage. Flank him to bypass it.

abilities.name: Taunt
abilities.desc: Forces nearby minions to attack him, pulling them off your squishier units.

name: Templar
description: A holy defender in blessed plate behind a cross-emblazoned shield. Slow, hits softly, but soaks punishment that would fell a knight — and when death looms, calls on the Light to Lay on Hands and heal a wound shut. Once per delve.
flavorText: The Light is my shield. I shall not fall here.

abilities.name: Lay on Hands
abilities.desc: Once per raid, when death looms, calls on the Light to heal a wound shut.

name: Pirate
description: A swashbuckling cutlass duelist — fast, reckless, and hungry for plunder. Cuts a beeline for the treasure and carries off extra gold if it reaches it. When run through and bleeding out, swigs a flask of grog and goes berserk — striking faster and harder for the rest of the raid.
flavorText: Dead men tell no tales. Lucky for me, I'm not dead yet.

abilities.name: Plunder Run
abilities.desc: Cuts a beeline for treasure and escapes with extra gold if he reaches it.

abilities.name: Bloody Grog
abilities.desc: When run through and bleeding out, swigs grog and goes berserk — faster, harder hits for the rest of the raid.

name: Rogue
description: Fast, fragile thief. Vanishes from sight to slip past or escape your minions, and picks your locked doors.
flavorText: If they catch me, I deserved it.

abilities.name: Vanish
abilities.desc: Turns invisible to slip past or escape your minions.

abilities.name: Lockpick
abilities.desc: Picks your locked doors open.

name: Mage
description: Glass cannon. Each run wields one random element — FIRE (burn), ICE (slow), LIGHTNING (arcs between minions), WIND (knockback) — and Arcane Burst amplifies it into an AoE or branching bolt.
flavorText: Fireball solves most problems. Survival is a different one.

abilities.name: Elemental Affinity
abilities.desc: Each run wields one random element: Fire (burn), Ice (slow), Lightning (arcs between minions), or Wind (knockback).

abilities.name: Arcane Burst
abilities.desc: Amplifies his element into an AoE blast or a branching bolt.

name: Cleric
description: Field medic for the party — heals wounded allies and rezzes the fallen. Light melee resistance, no offensive specialty.
flavorText: Faith is a weapon, and a bandage.

abilities.name: Heal
abilities.desc: Mends wounded allies in the party.

abilities.name: Resurrection
abilities.desc: Channels to raise a fallen ally back into the fight (once per day).

name: Necromancer
description: Conjures skeletons and zombies that fight for the party until day's end, and wears Bone Armor that grows stronger with each undead at his side.
flavorText: Death is a waste of perfectly good labour.

abilities.name: Summon Undead
abilities.desc: Conjures skeletons and zombies that fight for the party until day’s end.

abilities.name: Bone Armor
abilities.desc: Wears armor that grows stronger for each undead at his side.

name: Ranger
description: Ranged combatant. PIERCING SHOT: every few arrows fires a line shot that pierces every minion in a row — don't line them up. TRAP EXPERT: disarms your traps (with a fumble chance). Fires from a distance.
flavorText: First arrow. Second arrow. Third arrow. Out.

abilities.name: Piercing Shot
abilities.desc: Every few arrows, fires a line shot that pierces every minion in a row. Don’t line them up.

abilities.name: Trap Expert
abilities.desc: Disarms your traps from range (with a fumble chance).

name: Beast Master
description: Trained handler. TAMES one of your minions at a time (biggest threat first) to fight for him. SIC 'EM: the beast pounces a foe for a heavy maul. PACK TACTICS: he and the beast hit harder flanking the same target — kill the beast to defang him.
flavorText: Every beast was a person once, in their head.

abilities.name: Tame Beast
abilities.desc: Tames one of your minions at a time (the biggest threat in reach) to fight for him.

abilities.name: Sic 'Em
abilities.desc: Commands the tamed beast to pounce a foe for a heavy maul.

abilities.name: Pack Tactics
abilities.desc: He and his beast hit harder flanking the same target. Kill the beast to defang him.

name: Barbarian
description: Rage-fueled brawler. Damage scales as HP drops (up to 2x at near-death). Reckless Charge: barrels into your densest minion cluster, staggering them. Immune to fear and flee — never retreats.
flavorText: Pain is just bad weather. You walk through it.

abilities.name: Reckless Charge
abilities.desc: Barrels into your densest minion cluster, staggering them.

abilities.name: Bloodied Rage
abilities.desc: Hits harder the lower his HP — up to 2× near death. Immune to fear; never flees.

name: Monk
description: Unarmored, lightning-fast martial artist. RIPOSTE stance: a chance to dodge an incoming hit and instantly counter-strike the attacker. STUNNING PALM: a periodic melee strike that stuns a minion. ~30% dodge (incl. traps); strikes ignore half of minion defense.
flavorText: Be the wind around the blade.

abilities.name: Riposte
abilities.desc: Stance with ~30% chance to dodge a hit (including traps) and instantly counter-strike.

abilities.name: Stunning Palm
abilities.desc: A periodic strike that stuns a minion. Blows ignore half of minion defense.

name: Bard
description: Travelling performer. Plays a battle hymn that SWELLS the longer the fight rages — nearby allies gain escalating attack & speed (up to +20% / +16%). A solid hit or a stun shatters the song back to silence. On death, a final Encore heals the party.
flavorText: Every chord, a small kindness.

abilities.name: Battle Hymn
abilities.desc: A song that swells as the fight drags on, granting nearby allies escalating attack & speed (up to +20% / +16%). A solid hit or stun shatters it.

abilities.name: Encore
abilities.desc: On death, a final song heals the party.

name: Rival Monster
description: Foot soldier from a rival dungeon. Chasing the boss kill on behalf of their own dark lord.
flavorText: *snarl*

name: Rival Dungeon Boss
description: A boss from another dungeon, here to settle a score. Goes straight for the throne room.
flavorText: Only one of us walks out.

name: Cartographer Scholar
description: Mapper, not fighter. Tours every room (avoiding the boss), then leaves. Their notes spread to future adventurers.
flavorText: For science.

name: Cosplayer
description: Adventurer in a monster costume. Walks past most minions ignoring them; only fights if attacked.
flavorText: Wait — is that a real beholder, or a really good costume?

name: Loot Goblin
description: Pure thief. Spawns in the boss room and bolts for the exit. Will not stop to fight. Each one that escapes steals 10% of your gold.
flavorText: Snatch and giggle.

name: Cheater
description: Modded client. No-clips walls, teleports between rooms, lands suspicious one-shots. Glass-cannon body — gets reported and banned if they take too many hits.
flavorText: skill issue

abilities.name: Teleport
abilities.desc: No-clips through walls and blinks between rooms (sometimes glitches).

abilities.name: Aimhack
abilities.desc: A periodic strike with a chance to instantly one-shot.

abilities.name: Speed Hack
abilities.desc: Briefly doubles his movement speed.

name: Sung Jinwoo
description: The Shadow Monarch. Enters alone, raises your fallen minions as his shadow army, and marches on the throne to duel the boss as an equal. Moves twice as fast, shrugs off your defenses, and grows stronger with every shadow he claims.
flavorText: Arise.

name: Paladin
description: Light Party tank. Soaks every hit aimed at the party — minions within his Provoke aura ignore his fragile teammates and swing at his shield instead. Hits like a wet noodle on his own, but his teammates do plenty for him.
flavorText: Hallowed Ground. I yield to none.

name: White Mage
description: Light Party healer. Never attacks — only heals and revives the party. On any ally death, channels a 3-second Raise that brings them back at half HP. Interrupt her and the resurrection fizzles. Kill her and the party crumbles.
flavorText: Stay alive, all of you. I've got you.

name: Samurai
description: Light Party melee DPS. Wind-up iaijutsu strikes that hit twice as hard as a normal blade. Stays at the tank's shoulder, peels for the healer when she's threatened.
flavorText: One cut. One breath.

name: Black Mage
description: Light Party ranged DPS. Lobs spells over the tank's shoulder to hit your back-row minions. Glass cannon — squishy, but every cast lands like a comet. Cast bars are visible; interrupt windows exist.
flavorText: Fire. Blizzard. Thunder. Repeat.

name: Aldric
description: The Nemesis. A young swordsman certain he is the realm's greatest hero, sworn to cut down all evil — starting with you. Returns stronger every act, learns your dungeon, and disdains your treasure. Cannot be slain until the final duel.
flavorText: I came as a student. I return as a king.

name: Gladiator
description: Roman arena champion in Legion plate behind a Spartan hoplon. Feeds on the crowd — each minion he fells stokes a swelling Crowd Roar that sharpens his blade. When pressed, he plants the shield in a Block stance: untouchable for a beat, but he can't swing while braced.
flavorText: Are you not entertained?

abilities.name: Crowd Roar
abilities.desc: Each minion he fells stokes a swelling roar that sharpens his blade.

abilities.name: Block
abilities.desc: Plants his shield: untouchable for a beat, but he can’t swing while braced.

name: Peasant
description: An angry villager with a pitchfork and a grudge. Little threat alone — but they come in mobs, and the more peasants fight at his side, the bolder and stronger every one of them becomes (Strength in Numbers).
flavorText: Get the torches. And Gary. Get Gary too.

abilities.name: Strength in Numbers
abilities.desc: The more peasants fighting at his side, the bolder and stronger every one of them becomes.

name: Valkyrie
description: A winged shield-maiden of the heavens. Takes Winged Flight to soar over traps and chasms, and raises a Rally cry that steels nearby allies and lifts a downed one back to their feet.
flavorText: The brave do not die unwitnessed.

abilities.name: Winged Flight
abilities.desc: Soars over traps and chasms, ignoring them.

abilities.name: Rally the Fallen
abilities.desc: A rally cry that steels nearby allies and lifts a downed one back to their feet.

name: Gambler
description: Every strike is a Roll the Dice — whiff, crit, double-hit, self-heal, even a gold payout to you. On death, Double or Nothing: heads he revives at half HP, tails the house pays out to you.
flavorText: Fortune favors me. She just doesn't know it yet.

abilities.name: Roll the Dice
abilities.desc: Every strike gambles: whiff, crit, double-hit, self-heal, or even a gold payout to you.

abilities.name: Double or Nothing
abilities.desc: On death: heads he revives at half HP, tails the house pays out to you.

name: Miner
description: A grimy prospector with a pickaxe that bites like a weapon. When the path stalls, he Tunnels — digging down and surfacing at any floor tile across the dungeon, opening a shortcut that drags the raid into rooms you never wanted reached.
flavorText: There's always another way through. I make it.

abilities.name: Tunnel
abilities.desc: When the path stalls, digs down and resurfaces at any floor tile across the dungeon — a shortcut that drags the raid into rooms you never wanted reached.
